chapter_title.ar: بَابُ حَصَى الْجِمَارِ مِنْ أَيْنَ تُؤْخَذُ وَ مِقْدَارِهَا
chapter_title.en: Chapter 172 – The pebbles (for pelting) Al-Jamarahah, from where should these be taken, and their quantity

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/140)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/140)
text: خُذْ حَصَى الْجِمَارِ مِنْ جَمْعٍ وَ إِنْ أَخَذْتَهُ مِنْ رَحْلِكَ بِمِنًى أَجْزَأَكَ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Muawiya Bin Ammar who said,

Heasws said: ‘Take the pebbles (for pelting) the Jamarah (they exhibit these days in the shape of big size pillars), from Jam’a (place of assembly near Muzdalifah); and if you take it from your departure, in Mina, it would suffice you’.
en.sarwar: 1. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from Mu‘awiyah ibn ‘Ammar who has said the following: “He (the Imam), ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘You must pick up the pebbles for al-Jamar from Jam‘ and if you pick them up from your lodging in Mina’ it also is sufficient.’”
